transcript.speaker: Vittobha
transcript.text: Welcome everyone, this week we ship the agentic KYC pilot.

transcript.speaker: Anna
transcript.text: We need final sign-off on the eval threshold.

transcript.speaker: Vittobha
transcript.text: Set it at 99% precision per Promptfoo run.

transcript.speaker: Raj
transcript.text: I will draft the rollback plan by Thursday.

transcript.speaker: Anna
transcript.text: And I will own the comms to bank ops by Friday.

summary: Agentic KYC pilot ships this week. Eval threshold confirmed at 99% precision (Promptfoo-gated). Rollback plan and bank ops comms owned and dated.
